title: How do I install a locally developed app in my monday.com?
excerpt:
Hi folks, 
I’m new to app development with monday.com and I’m trying to wrap my head around installing an app on my own monday.com workspace for testing. I have the github samples, I’m doing local development and I’m try…

posts.author: razme (Raz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi folks,

I’m new to app development with monday.com and I’m trying to wrap my head around installing an app on my own monday.com workspace for testing. I have the github samples, I’m doing local development and I’m trying to determine what are the steps I need to perform to have the app and feature show up in the marketplace? I couldn’t find the explicit steps in the documentation.

Sorry for the basic question and many thanks in advance!

Cheers
Raz

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @razme,

Welcome to the community!

Here are some instructions for installing the app on your own account. Once you do that, the app will appear in the Installed Apps section of the marketplace!

Installed apps2872×1568 508 KB

Let us know if you have any other questions!

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: When @rachelatmonday says the marketplace above, she means the embedded marketplace for your monday.com account rather than the publicly accessible marketplace at https://monday.com/marketplace

posts.author: razme (Raz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @rachelatmonday and @dvdsmpsn !

I think I’m still missing something. I have the app running locally, I managed to install it, I have a recipe that I applied. Now I created a new version of the app, added a new recipe, and hit promote to live. I don’t see my app in the Integrations page anymore.

Here’s what I have:

  • app running locally:
    image1670×123 17.4 KB

  • I have a recipe already applied to my board:
    image897×178 9.55 KB
  • My app is nowhere to be found on the “Integrations” page:
    image1761×640 66 KB

What am I missing? Thanks so much!

posts.author: razme (Raz)
posts.cookedHtml: One more update here is that the application shows up on other boards, but not on this particular board where I’m trying to add it. I have an open case with support to figure this out.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @razme,

That is odd. Thank you for opening a request for our team! It looks like we might need to investigate this one. Our team will handle it
